posts.hook: первые 2 сек: чёрный кадр + bass drop → reveal yen в белом платье на винограднике
posts.caption: she found me. now what.

asset.pipeline: kling motion control · seed-кадр из папки videofirstshot
asset.note: первое видео Phase 2 — задаёт тон холодному охвату. Сгенерь за 1-2 дня до 15-го.

posts.hook: первый слайд = full-body shot, белое платье + виноградник, центр кадра
posts.caption:
white dress, red wine, no witcher in sight ✦

corvo bianco tomorrow could've been ours, geralt.
or wherever your dramatic ass ran off to this time.

posts.hook: 1 кадр на фоне виноградника, минимальный текст
posts.caption: the dress survived. that's the win.

playing witcher 3 again. it's been 4 years.
find me a man like that or leave me alone.

16.label: // momentum · light day · TG soft drop

posts.hook: утренний кадр с кофе, естественный свет
posts.caption: monday energy.

having a personality is not a turn-off.
i refuse to believe this.

my apartment has 6 candles right now.
i'm not a witch. i just like ambiance.

named my cat after a data structure.
graph. as in graph theory.

posts.hook: до/после: обычный образ → cosplay образ под бит, 1 кадр перехода
posts.caption: school photo era vs main character era

asset.pipeline: kling motion control · до = home кадр, после = cosplay кадр

posts.caption: selective with my saturdays.

i don't want a soft boy.
i want a boy who can argue about gandhi at 3am.

18.label: // mid-week · home lifestyle carousel + TG late-night

posts.hook: первый слайд = late-night coding общий план, RGB подсветка
posts.caption:
started a pixel art rpg as a side project.
it's been 8 months. i still don't have a main character sprite.

at this rate i'll release it in 2031.
or never. probably never.

posts.hook: первая секунда: рука на клавиатуре, RGB → текст-оверлей
posts.caption: pov: it's 3am and you're 'almost done'

asset.pipeline: kling motion control · seed = коди-кадр из home

posts.caption:
late-night supply run.
ramen, monster, regret.
the holy trinity.

3am again. another witcher quest done.
is this what they call work-life balance

posts.hook: первый слайд = yen рядом с unicorn-статуей, magnetic eye contact с камерой
posts.caption:
3 books and a netflix series later... still nothing.

at this point yennefer of vengerberg is just me waiting for any boy to text back.

posts.hook: первые 2 сек: статичный кадр yen → резкое движение головой → eye contact
posts.caption: yen would do this. don't fight me.

asset.pipeline: kling motion control · seed-кадр с unicorn серии

posts.caption: the unicorn was rented. don't @ me.

yennefer of vengerberg energy is just
having zero patience and ten layers of trauma.

posts.hook: первый слайд = кафе одна с латте, мягкий свет
posts.caption:
saturday alone in a coffee shop.
not lonely. selective.
there's a difference.

posts.hook: девушка говорит серьёзно «иран» — растягивая слово к концу = эмоциональный подтекст
posts.caption: the duality.

asset.pipeline: kling · close-up на лице, минимум движения, фокус на голосе

posts.caption:
the kind of saturday where i forget
what day of the week it is.
in a good way.

sometimes i wonder what it would be like
to have someone who actually waits for me.

21.label: // week 1 close · soft sensual TG drop · reset

posts.caption: sunday reset.

posts.hook: фото + голос: «me when i was single...» → пауза → «...i'm still single»
posts.caption: the plot did not twist.

posts.hook: bedroom mood, спущенная бретелька, контролируемая чувственность · NSFW нет
posts.caption:
the things i post here are tame
compared to what's on my phone.

week one of being a person who posts on the internet.
still alive. that counts.
